edgeCases: Zero-config (no flag, no global, no driver) resolves to strict byte-identically
Unknown/typo'd driver model with no capability falls back to strict (safe)
Explicit global enforcement_profile beats capability and is honored but NOT pinned
capability_profiles remaps a class to any profile (frontier->guided)
Driver resolution precedence: --model flag > CENTINELA_MODEL env > config driver_model
Opaque/unknown model id is accepted and pins without error
Absent/empty capability tables and nil cfg are valid (no-op)
Model id matched by trim but case-sensitive; capability class normalized trim+lowercase
User [orchestration.capabilities] override beats the built-in model map
Bad capability config (unknown class/profile, empty model-id key) fails config.Load naming the offender
Status provenance strings locked (Unicode arrow U+2192) for all five tiers
